title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Armed Forces (Jammu and Kashmir) Special Powers Act, 1990. (2) It extends to the whole of the State of Jammu and Kashmir*. (3) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 5th day of July, 1990.
footnote: *. Vide notification No. S.O. 3912(E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
